finding: Cx: renal ischemia (with large lesion), persistent hematuria, rupture

differentials.name: Renal allograft necrosis / infarct =  total lack of perfusion in an area of renal cortex associated with variable degrees of medullary necrosis Cause:   rejection, surgical ligature, preexistent arterial lesion, severe ATN, prolonged time of warm ischemia
differentials.raw: Renal allograft necrosis / infarct =  total lack of perfusion in an area of renal cortex associated with variable degrees of medullary necrosis Cause:   rejection, surgical ligature, preexistent arterial lesion, severe ATN, prolonged time of warm ischemia

differentials.name: Large isolated area of infarction ← segmental arterial occlusion)
differentials.raw: Large isolated area of infarction ← segmental arterial occlusion)

differentials.name: Necrosis of whole kidney ← occlusion of main renal artery
differentials.raw: Necrosis of whole kidney ← occlusion of main renal artery

context: Pattern: MR: √  slightly hyperintense ← ischemic necrosis / hypointense ← hemorrhagic necrosis / isointense area on T2WI √  hypointense areas on Gd-DTPA images US: √  hypoechoic ← ischemic necrosis / iso- or hyperechoic areas ← hemorrhagic necrosis √  swollen area ← probably cortical edema √  absence of arterial perfusion by color duplex (not sensitive for small infarcts / superficial cortical necrosis) √  elevated resistive indexes + no / reversed diastolic flow
